name: ds004577
description: Dataset containing resting EEG for a sample of 103 normal infants in the first year of life. eeg dataset accessible via EEGDash as `DS004577` with standardized BIDS metadata.

funder.name: Dirección General Del Personal Académico IT200223

Dataset containing resting EEG for a sample of 103 normal infants in the first year of life. doi:10.18112/openneuro.ds004577.v1.0.1
